data.content: Implementation complete on branch worktree-knots-25b6-deferred-sync. Changes: (1) Added SyncOutcome enum to replication.rs with Completed/Deferred variants, (2) Added sync_or_defer_with_progress to ReplicationService and App that returns Deferred instead of erroring on active leases and marks sync_pending, (3) Added trigger_queued_sync to App that best-effort runs queued sync when no active leases remain, (4) Hooked trigger into lease unbind_lease and execute_lease_terminate in write_dispatch.rs, (5) Updated main.rs Sync handler to use sync_or_defer and display deferred message in text/JSON, (6) Added 4 unit tests for trigger_queued_sync and 1 replication test for sync_or_defer. Push/pull remain blocked by active leases. Make sanity passes at 95.22% coverage.
